{{Quote|I do hope the boy set a long fuse on that thermal detonator! One-dash-Five-Oh-Seven is so terribly clumsy.|[[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Star by Star">''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''</ref>}}
'''YVH 1-507A''' was a [[YVH 1]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] protecting the [[Solo family/Legends|Solos]] during the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Coruscant]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
